backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister for a jewellery order management system, including data types (Order, Karigar, DesignMapping), persistent maps for orders/karigars/design mappings, and shared functions for creating, querying, and supplying orders with partial quantity support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs (related to karigar resolution, tab fixes, and edge case handling) to their implementing source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Jewellery Order Management System' and mounting the React app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider (dark mode), QueryClientProvider, and a sidebar layout with mobile header support.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that displays CO-type orders with Pending status, supporting text search filtering by order number, design code, or generic name, and rendering results via the reusable OrderTable component.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: A modal dialog component that fetches and displays a design image by design code, supporting zoom and pan interactions via mouse and touch events.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: A dashboard tab that lists orders in Hallmark status, grouped by design, with filtering, bulk selection, status update to ReturnFromHallmark, and export (JPEG/PDF) capabilities.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: A dashboard tab that groups pending orders by karigar (artisan) using design mappings, displaying summary stats per karigar and navigating to a karigar detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: A reusable table component for displaying orders with support for bulk selection, marking orders as ready, deleting orders, and exporting to Excel, PDF, or JPEG formats.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: A dashboard tab showing Ready-status orders grouped by design, with search filtering, bulk selection, marking orders as pending, partial-quantity returns, and PDF/image export.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Displays four summary stat cards (Total/Ready/Hallmark/Return) showing unique order counts, quantities, and dynamic weights derived from all orders, with loading skeletons and active tab highlighting.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog for batch-supplying RB orders that lets users edit supplied quantities per order, validates against available quantities, and submits via the batch supply mutation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: Renders the Total Orders tab showing pending orders grouped by design code with search/type filtering, selection, mark-as-ready, delete, and supply actions.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: Shows an alert banner listing design codes that are missing generic name or karigar name mappings, with navigation buttons to the unmapped codes and master designs pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: Application sidebar with navigation links to all major pages, active route highlighting, and a Data Reset button that opens a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: Confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via the reset mutation, with success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog component that allows users to reassign a master design to a different karigar (artisan), supporting both selecting an existing karigar and adding a new one, with cache invalidation on save.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks and mutations for fetching orders, karigars, master designs, design mappings, and design images from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values for the design system, including transitions, focus, and disabled states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: A page component that displays pending orders grouped by design code with color-coded age bands (green/yellow/red based on days pending), supporting bulk selection and marking orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: A barcode scanning page that supports both hardware scanner (keyboard buffer) and camera-based QR scanning, accumulates scanned order IDs, and batch-updates their status via a mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page displaying summary cards and tabbed views (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) populated from all orders fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: A page for uploading design images to the backend either from a folder selection or a ZIP file, processing them in batches and reporting per-file upload results.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: A page for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it with a utility, and sequentially saving each order to the canister backend while reporting success/failure results.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: A detail page for a specific karigar showing their pending orders, supporting selection, marking orders as ready (with a supply dialog for RB orders), and exporting orders to JPEG, PDF, or Excel.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: A page for uploading and managing master design mappings from an Excel file, displaying the current mappings in a table, and supporting editing of individual design-to-karigar assignments.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: React page for uploading and reconciling a master Excel file against existing orders, parsing rows with SheetJS from CDN and allowing users to review and persist matched/unmatched data.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: React page that displays ready orders grouped by design code with date-range filtering, checkbox selection, and clipboard copy of order numbers for tag printing workflows.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: React page listing orders with missing generic name or karigar mappings, allowing inline editing and saving via updateDesignMapping or reassignDesign mutations.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Utility component that renders a color-coded badge showing how many days ago an order was placed, with green/amber/red thresholds at 14 and 29 days.
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Utility that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an Excel file into an array of ParsedOrder objects, normalizing headers and resolving order types and dates.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Utility providing exportToExcel (SheetJS CDN with CSV fallback) and a pure-client-side PDF builder that generates per-order pages for a list of Order objects.
frontend/src/utils/karigarResolver.ts: Utility functions to resolve a karigar name from a design code using a DesignMapping map, and to build that map from raw getAllMasterDesignMappings responses.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, gold, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing an order management app focused on fixing karigar (artisan) resolution to always derive karigar_name dynamically from master_design lookup by design_code, covering known issues, architectural notes, and existing feature requirements for TotalOrdersTab, KarigarsTab, KarigarDetail, and edge-case handling.
